results.question: Which papers report which venue series?
results.raw_model_output:
```sparql
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel ?venue ?venue_name WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venue_name .
  ?contribution orkgp:P31 ?paper .
  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
}
```

results.question: Which papers report which research paradigm?
results.raw_model_output:
```sparql
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?paper ?paperLabel ?paradigm ?paradigmLabel
WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P57003 ?paradigm .
  ?paradigm rdfs:label ?paradigmLabel .
  ?contribution orkgp:P31 ?paper .
  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
}
```
